summary: Adjusted the placement and behavior of `Location Mode` and `Port Block List` in Create Profile. In `NetworkTab`, `Location Mode` now sits directly above the custom coordinate panel and controls that panel explicitly; the custom coordinate block is hidden unless `Custom` is selected, so the control placement now matches the feature flow more clearly. In `SecurityTab`, `Port Block List` now appears directly under `Port Block Mode` in the same logical block, and the tag input now has predefined common port options (80, 443, 1080, 3000, 3306, 5432, 6379, 8080, 9222, 27017) while still allowing custom port entry. Lints for the modified files are clean.
current_status: Create Profile’s geolocation and port blocking UI are now better aligned with the intended layout: Location Mode drives the custom coordinate section visually and functionally, and Port Block List has selectable values plus custom entry. The previously implemented plan-aligned payload/storage changes remain intact.
